title: CMS Measures
description: This page lists CMS electronic clinical quality measures (eCQMs) from the VSAC library. Each measure has a CMS identifier (e.g. CMS349v6), a CBE number assigned by the National Quality Forum, a reporting program (MIPS, Hospital, etc.), and a set of value sets that define its population criteria.
tips: Search by CMS ID (e.g. 'CMS349'), CBE number, or measure title.
Click a CMS ID to see all value sets linked to that measure and their OMOP concept coverage.
CBE numbers are assigned by the National Quality Forum (NQF) and are used in regulatory reporting.
Each measure's value sets define the patient population, numerator, denominator, and exclusion criteria.
Measures used by care bundles in Parthenon appear on their respective bundle detail pages — this library contains the full CMS eCQM catalog.
